entry.title: New: Bill 98, FD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, OFFICE OF RECOVERY PROGRAM, DECREASE CATEGORY B BY $25,000, AND OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ADMINISTRATION PROGRAM, BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF MAUI, INC. FOR 2025 KA PEWA YOUTH LEADERSHIP SUMMIT, NEW APPROPRIATION OF $25,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
